suggestion.rationale: All six records have distinct identity keys: the three B82 records differ in service variant (limited, local, sbs), and the remaining three records have different base route IDs (B82E, BM2, BM5). The per-kind route rule that different variants never merge, and that different base route IDs denote different routes, directly applies. No ambiguity exists because payload identity fields clearly specify route_id and service_variant for each record.
